title: Required tools are missing
description: The following tools must be installed for purplemux to work.
agentInstallPromptDescription: Install Claude CLI now, or cancel and install it manually before starting a Claude tab.
agentPathPromptTitle: Claude CLI PATH is not configured
agentPathPromptDescription: Claude CLI was found in ~/.local/bin, but it is not available on PATH. Add it to your shell profile now, or cancel and update PATH manually.
codexMissingDescription: Open the Codex CLI install guide, or cancel and install it manually before starting a Codex tab.
preflightFailedDescription: purplemux could not verify the agent CLI installation. The current action was canceled.
